seo_title: Exploreans Watamu Beach Club and Villas | Authentic Coastal Retreat near Watamu, Kenya
seo_description: Escape to Exploreans Watamu Beach Club & Villas, a boutique eco-retreat on the pristine shores of Mayungu. Discover raw, authentic Kenyan coastal luxury. Book your stay.
name: Watamu Beach Club & Villas
tagline: Intimate. Quietly built. A slower rhythm altogether.
description: Exploreans Watamu is not a resort designed to be everything to everyone; it is a place designed to be everything for those who seek the real, the unscripted, and the untouched. Nestled in the quiet fishing bay of Mayungu, between Malindi and Watamu, this boutique ecolodge sits where the coastline remains true to its origins—a wild paradise preserved from the rush of mass tourism.
